title: Nemesis Now Emerald Overseer Dragon Statue - 18cm Resin Figurine with LED Light, Hand-Painted Dragon Figure for Collectors and Fantasy Decor
features: Majestic Crystal Dragon: This dragon figurine features a majestic green dragon, expertly guarding a shimmering geode cave, embodying the allure of dragon figures. A stunning addition to dragon statues and figurine collections.

Vibrant Metallic Finish: Expertly cast in resin, this dragon sculpture showcases vibrant metallic finishes, offering striking visual appeal. Ideal for collectors of dragon figurines for adults and dragon collectibles.

Illuminated Crystal Gemstone: The dragon light centerpiece highlights an illuminated crystal gemstone with an LED light and base switch. This dragon decor adds a captivating glow to any fantasy figurines collection.

Intricate Dragon Sculpture: This dragon statue large in stature, measures 18 cm, making it a notable piece among dragon sculptures and statues. Its intricate design appeals to enthusiasts of dragon figures for adults.

Fantasy Decor Essential: Ideal for dragon collectibles, this glass dragon enhances any fantasy decor. Perfectly suited for dragon statues and figurines aficionados seeking to elevate their dragon decor collection.
description: Introducing the Emerald Overseer Dragon Decorative Resin Figurine by Nemesis Now, a captivating addition to any collection of dragon sculptures and statues. This piece stands at an impressive 18 cm, meticulously crafted to capture the essence of fantasy and mysticism. Each dragon figure is cast in high-quality resin, ensuring durability and longevity, while the hand-painted finishes bring the dragon to life, highlighting its majestic presence. The centerpiece of this remarkable dragon figurine is a green geode cave. The intricate detailing of the dragon's scales and the majestic posture reflect the mastery of craftsmanship that Nemesis Now is renowned for. This crystal dragon is brought to life with an LED light, which emits a mesmerizing glow, activated with a base switch. This light-up dragon feature adds an enchanting ambiance to any room, making it a coveted addition for collectors and enthusiasts. This dnd statue is not just a decorative piece; it is a testament to the mythical allure that dragons hold in fantasy lore. Ideal for those who appreciate fantasy figurines, the Emerald Overseer Dragon is designed to complement any collection of dragon figurines for adults or dragon collectibles. Its vibrant green hue and sculpted features make it an eye-catching centerpiece for any display. Whether you are an avid collector of dragon statues and figurines or seeking to add a touch of fantasy to your home decor, this dragon sculpture is a striking choice. Its presence is sure to captivate the imagination of those who admire the mystical world of dragons. Embrace the mythical with Nemesis Now's Emerald Overseer Dragon Decorative Resin Figurine—a timeless piece that embodies the spirit of fantasy and magical realms. Whether displayed as a standalone piece or as part of a broader collection this dragon statuette is a testament to the enduring fascination with these legendary creatures, offering a glimpse into a world where dragons reign supreme.
